summary: The implementation covers most core requirements including news feed, categories, article detail, bookmarks, and search. The design is modern and mobile-optimized with Tailwind CSS. However, some acceptance criteria gaps exist: pagination/infinite scroll logic may be incomplete, backend lacks reverse chronological ordering guarantee, and search results may not use the same card format as feed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Feed supports infinite scroll or pagination
missing_requirements.reason: While infinite scroll is implemented with IntersectionObserver in NewsFeed.tsx, the backend pagination methods (getArticlesOffset, getArticlesByCategoryOffset) are truncated and their implementation cannot be verified. The query logic appears correct but backend support is unclear.

missing_requirements.requirement: Articles are returned in reverse chronological order
missing_requirements.reason: Backend code is truncated and does not show the implementation of article retrieval methods. No evidence of sorting by timestamp in descending order is visible in the backend implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Search results display in same card format as feed
missing_requirements.reason: The SearchResultsPage.tsx implementation is not included in the diff summary. While useSearchArticles hook exists (truncated), the page component that would render search results using ArticleCard is missing, so conformance cannot be verified.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile management system with name field
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not specify user profiles or name collection. The implementation includes ProfileSetupModal, getCallerUserProfile, saveCallerUserProfile, and UserProfile type which were not requested.
BuildRequest specifies 'cohesive color scheme' but does not request dark mode or theme toggling. The implementation includes dark mode CSS variables and ThemeProvider from next-themes.

hallucinated_features.description: Access control and authorization system with admin/user roles
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest mentions 'single-actor Motoko architecture' and 'Authentication through Internet Identity only' but does not specify role-based access control, admin-only article management, or permission checking.
BuildRequest does not specify any footer content or third-party attribution requirements. Implementation includes AppFooter with caffeine.ai branding and UTM tracking links.
